title: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web

Title: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web

We're reviewing the timeline of this impact start and recovery to isolate whether any specific change caused this event and isolate a means to expedite a full mitigation for the remaining impacted users.

Scope of impact: Some users attempting to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web may be impacted.

Title: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web

User impact: Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web.

Current status: We've identified an authentication issue on a portion of Outlook on the web infrastructure responsible for downloading and opening attachments is resulting in impact. We're restarting the affected portion of infrastructure to remediate impact, and we're monitoring telemetry to ensure the issue is resolved, or to identify if any additional remediation actions may be needed.

Scope of impact: Some users attempting to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web may be impacted. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.

User impact: Users may have been unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web.

Final status: We've restarted the affected portion of infrastructure and confirmed through monitoring internal service health telemetry that the impact has been remediated.
 
Scope of impact: Some users attempting to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web may have been impacted.
 
Start time: Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 4:00 AM UTC
 
End time: Friday, April 17, 2026, at 5:00 PM UTC
 
Root cause: An authentication issue on a portion of Outlook on the web infrastructure responsible for downloading and opening attachments was resulting in impact.
 
Next steps: 
- We're reviewing the affected portion of Outlook on the web infrastructure to determine how the authentication issue was introduced, so that we can prevent similar instances of impact from occurring in the future.
 
This is the final update for the event.
